plist.dict:
Label __LABEL__
ProgramArguments
__PROGRAM_PATH__
WorkingDirectory __WORKING_DIRECTORY__
EnvironmentVariables __ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES__
RunAtLoad
KeepAlive
ProcessType Background
LimitLoadToSessionType Aqua
ThrottleInterval 30
StandardOutPath __STDOUT_PATH__
StandardErrorPath __STDERR_PATH__
